name: 海豹短刀（★） | 人工染色
nameZh: 海豹短刀（★） | 人工染色
descriptionEn: A classic of the Counter-Strike series, the edge of this knife is press-fit Stellite perfectly held in place due to its precise fit with the titanium on the blade's cheek and spine. The handle is fossilized mastodon ivory held in a carbon fibre pocket. It has been given a forced patina using lemon and mustard dripped onto the surface. If you think it's messy now, wait until you see it under a blacklight
descriptionZh: 作为反恐精英系列的经典物品，这把刀的刀锋由钴基合金压制，与钛制刀片、龙骨精准结合。整把刀浑然一体。握柄采用了碳纤维包裹的石化乳齿象牙。 通过将柠檬汁和芥末滴到这把武器的表面，它被人工地附上了氧化层。 你也许以为刀刃上一团糟，请在黑光灯源下瞧瞧吧
